agent.name: cipher
agent.stack: Anchor Verify, Soteria, Rust Security Analysis

task.title: Solana Program Security Audit — Account Validation, Signer Checks, Arithmetic Safety (Cipher - Security Tooling)
task.description: Perform a security review of the CTO Pay Anchor program covering the OWASP-equivalent Solana program vulnerability classes: account validation, signer verification, arithmetic safety, PDA collision, rent exemption, and reentrancy. Produce a findings report with severity ratings and remediation guidance.

implementation.details: 1. **Static analysis**: - Run `anchor verify ` to confirm deployed bytecode matches source. - Run Soteria static analyzer (if available): `soteria -analyzeAll
